name: About
description: A bit of information about the guide.

name: Sounds
description: How to pronounce the sounds in Sanskrit. These lessons also show how different sounds relate to each other and why these relationships are vital to understanding Sanskrit.

name: Verbs
description: How to create our first Sanskrit sentences.

name: Nouns
description: Who sees? Where? Here we learn new words to answer these questions.

name: Uninflected words
description: By using uninflected words, we can create slightly more complicated sentences.

name: Compounds
description: The easiest way to make new words out of the ones we know already.

name: Roots
description: How to work with verbs at a deeper level.

name: Prefixes and suffixes
description: How to rapidly create thousands of new words.
